payload.answer: Stored a memory card noting the fetch failure (404 network error) for the provided article URL; no content was available to store.

entity_resolution.reason: Only a URL string is provided; no stable entity identifier is available.

memory_cards.statement: A request to fetch the article at https://example.com/missing returned a 404 network error (content could not be retrieved).

details: Created one durable memory card for fetch_failure.
Did not store article content since retrieval failed.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL later to confirm the failure reason.
Verify the correct URL/path for the article slug 'missing'.
Store an updated URL if the article was relocated or renamed.
